visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Close-up shots of a light green foldable smartphone resting on a reflective surface. The phone is folded, showing its thin profile and camera lenses. (2) A man in a grey t-shirt and khaki pants puts the folded phone into his back pocket. Then, the man (3C Tim) appears in a medium shot, wearing a grey t-shirt, a blue cap, and glasses, holding the phone. (3) Close-up of a digital scale showing 216.2 g with the phone on it. (4) The man is shown in various indoor settings (office/studio-like and home-like). He unfolds the phone to show its large screen. (5) Screen recording shots of the phone interface, showing multi-tasking with a map and a YouTube window. (6) The man is in a room with a wardrobe, using the phone AI feature to get outfit suggestions. (7) The man is in a dining area, holding a menu, using the phone AI to translate/suggest food. (8) The man talks to the camera, showcasing the phone from different angles and mentioning a specific color Mountain Mist Green. He ends with a call to action.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你有沒有想過. (2) [Variety]: 摺疊機 有多薄?. (3) [Subtitle]: 比1支鉛筆還薄!. (4) [Subtitle]: 薄到你可以直接放進口袋 還不會凸出來. (5) [Logo]: 3C Tim CHI-YI WEI. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且不只薄 還更輕. (7) [Slogan]: 比一杯咖啡 還更輕. (8) [Subtitle]: 史上最薄 效能又強的AI摺疊機 就是我現在手上這台 Galaxy Z Fold7. (9) [Slogan]: 絕對很值得入手. [Variety]: 顏色也超質感!. (10) [Subtitle]: 你看 展開以後 8吋的大螢幕. (11) [Subtitle]: 你要呢 做簡報 做筆記 甚至於呢你要拿它查資料 多工處理! 完全你可以把它當筆電使用. (12) [Variety]: 超讚~. (13) [Subtitle]: 如果你現在臨時要出門 參加一個聚會 不曉得怎麼穿搭的話 請Gemini Live 直接來幫你做搭配. (14) [Variety]: 實測中. (15) [Subtitle]: 幫我看一下我現在衣櫥的這些衣服跟褲子 我要怎麼穿搭去參加朋友的聚會最好. (16) [Subtitle]: 好像不錯耶 肚子好餓喔 剛好飯店有客房服務 可是全部都英文耶 那我們請Gemini Live來幫我建議一下. (17) [Subtitle]: 如果我要吃素的話 這菜單有沒有 萊幫我!. (18) [Subtitle]: 是的簡單 這次Z Fold 7這麼多容量版本 我直接推薦購買 大容量1TB 直接攻上頂規. (19) [Subtitle]: 不管你是 存很多照片 影片 檔案 1TB肯定夠用. (20) [Subtitle]: 像你現在看到我這台 就是限定色「山嵐綠」 如果你想跟我一樣 用最新的摺疊的話 到三星商城下單輸入 指定序號 再送你精美禮物.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a blue patterned flat cap. He wears a grey t-shirt in some scenes and a white t-shirt with a red logo (ROOTS) in others. He wears khaki pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts with a close-up of the phone on a glass table. Then a studio/office background with some electronics. Later, a bedroom/closet area and a dining table near a window.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat electronic pop music begins instantly. A male voice speaks with an excited, high-arousal tone, accompanied by sharp 'whoosh' sound effects coinciding with visual transitions. (2) The music continues at a steady 120 BPM tempo. The male speaker maintains a fast-paced narrative, his pitch modulating frequently to emphasize features like thinness and lightness. A light 'pop' SFX is heard. (3) A female AI voice enters, speaking with a calm, synthesized, and very clear tone, providing a contrast to the energetic male narrator. The background music ducks slightly to prioritize the AI's response. (4) The male narrator returns with higher volume and excitement, discussing the phone storage and color. Transition 'whoosh' sounds reappear. The music builds slightly in energy towards a final concluding phrase.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional review of the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7. It highlights its physical design (thin, light), large screen productivity, and AI capabilities (Gemini Live) to persuade viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter directly recommends the product, mentions specific purchase locations (Samsung Mall), and provides a promo code.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality tech marketing content tailored for short-form social media platforms, using fast cuts and informative overlays.
